text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Decisions, decisions! Which one should I
get?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Should I get the limited-edition Flavor Explosion
Chips?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Or should I grab the Sweetie Pie Chocolate Bar
that I already know I love?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, it's impossible to pick! Which snack am I
supposed to eat after school today?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, what do you think I should choose?!
choice_data_list: You gotta go with the new flavor.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right?! What's even the point if I'm not doing
something exciting?! ♪ I'm not great with spice,
but I gotta at least try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's method of choosing snacks
might be a good approach to running too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeah, I get you. Gotta stick with what you
know when it comes to snacks.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's such a bummer when you try
something new and it sucks! Okay, then this one it
is!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hm, hmmm! ♪ I can't wait for school to be
over! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's method of choosing snacks
might be a good approach to running too.
